free_text: RIKKYO UNIVERSITY, TOKYO.
MAIN REF.
IDENTICAL TO MAIN REF.
-DIFFERENTIAL CROSS SECTIONS FOR ELASTIC AND INELASTIC
NEUTRON SCATTERING FROM 12-C AT 14.1 MEV.
THE RIKKYO UNIVERSITY 300 KV COCKCROFT-WALTON
ACCELERATOR.
.ABSOLUTE MEASUREMENTS
NEUTRONS WERE PRODUCED BY BOMBARDING A TRITIUM
TARGET WITH 165 KEV DEUTERONS.
.THE FWHM OF THE INCIDENT 14.1 MEV NEUTRONS WAS ESTI-
MATED TO BE 320 KEV.
.THE GRAPHITE SCATTERING SAMPLE WAS 3 CM IN DIAMTER AND
3 CM LONG, AND HAD A PURITY OF 99.9 PERCENT.
THE ENERGY OF THE SCATTERED NEUTRONS WERE DE-
TERMINED WITH TIME-OF-FLIGHT TECHNIQUES, USING A
FLIGHT PATH OF 180 CM AND AN OVERALL TIME RESOLUTION
OF 0.7 NS FWHM.
THE NEUTRON FLUX WAS DETERMINED BY MEASURING
THE ASSICIATED ALPHA-PARTICLE.
THE SCATTERED NEUTRONS WERE DETECTED WITH A 2
INCH DIAMTER BY 2 INCH THICK NE213 LIQUID SCINTILLA-
TOR. DATA FOR SPECIFIC FINAL STATES WERE ALSO TAKEN
WITH A 10 CM DIAMTER BY 30 CM LONG NE213 DETECTOR.
THE ASSOCIATED ALPHA PARTICLES WERE DETECTED WITH A
50 MICRO-M THICK NE102A PLASTIC SCINTILLATOR.
.THE DATA GIVEN ARE NOT CORRECTED FOR DEGRADED NEUTRON
EFFECTS.
NO DETAILS GIVEN.
.DATA TAKEN FROM MAIN REF. NUMERICAL CROSS SECTIONS
OBTAINED FROM S. SHIRATO.
N.O.
*  *  CORRECTED BY S. MAEV
MONITOR KEYWORD AND EN-RSL ADDED IN SAN 001  *  *
.DATA TAKEN FROM MAIN REF. NUMERICAL CROSS SECTIONS
OBTAINED FROM S. SHIRATO.
N.O.
REACTION CODE SF4 ADDED
DATA TAKEN WITH 2 INCH BY 2 INCH DETECTOR.

.DATA TAKEN FROM MAIN REF. NUMERICAL CROSS SECTIONS
OBTAINED FROM S. SHIRATO.
